channel.title: Snowflake Engineering Blog
channel.description: Engineering deep dives, infrastructure, and AI/ML from Snowflake

item.title: Reduce Risk and Save Time: Scaling Trust with Agentic AI
item.description: Reduce Risk and Save Time: Scaling Trust with Agentic AI

item.title: What’s New in Apache Polaris 1.4: Advanced Multi-Tenancy and Streamlined Deployment
item.description: What’s New in Apache Polaris 1.4: Advanced Multi-Tenancy and Streamlined Deployment

item.title: Mining Query History to Build Better Semantic Models for AI
item.description: Mining Query History to Build Better Semantic Models for AI

item.title: LLM Serving Made Easy: High-Throughput Inference with vLLM
item.description: Easily productionize open source models with one-click Hugging Face imports. Learn how Snowflake’s vLLM architecture optimizes memory for maximum throughput.

item.title: Rethinking Certificate Revocation at Snowflake
item.description: Snowflake is deprecating OCSP in drivers for CRLs and short-lived certificates. Learn why we're disabling revocation checking by default for better resiliency.

item.title: Turbocharging parse_json() in Snowflake: 2x Faster Performance Without Changing a Line of Code
item.description: Discover how Snowflake's new parse_json() implementation uses SIMDJson to deliver 2x faster JSON parsing with 100% backward compatibility for all accounts.

item.title: The Community Won: Apache Polaris, the Iceberg REST Catalog and the End of Vendor Lock-In
item.description: Discover how Apache Polaris graduated to a Top-Level Project, providing a vendor-neutral Iceberg REST Catalog for true data interoperability.

item.title: Do You Need to Tune Postgres Vacuum?
item.description: Learn why Postgres vacuuming matters, how autovacuum works, and when to tune it to prevent bloat, improve performance, and avoid transaction ID wraparound issues.

item.title: If You're Serious About Data Analysis, You Need a Semantic Model
item.description: Convince data and analytics leaders that a semantic model is no longer optional for reliable, governed analytics at scale, and position Snowflake Semantic Views as the practical, unified solution that converges BI and AI workflows.

item.title: Solving the Identifier Mismatch Challenge in Multi-Engine Lakehouses
item.description: This post explores identifier case sensitivity challenge in multi-engine lakehouses and explains how Snowflake ensures seamless interoperability

item.title: Accuracy at What Cost? Benchmarking Agentic Reasoning with MADQA
item.description: Introducing MADQA: A new multimodal benchmark for AI agents. Discover why leading models fail the "efficiency test" and how humans still outperform AI in strategic document navigation.

item.title: Faster, Smarter, Autonomous: Snowflake SQL Performance Improvements Year in Review
item.description: Discover Snowflake's autonomous performance improvements, including Optima and Gen2 Warehouses.

item.title: Snowflake Interactive Analytics: Breaking Down a Few Major Updates
item.description: Learn about the latest Snowflake Interactive enhancements, including multi-cloud support for Azure and GCP, replication, search optimization, and storage lifecycle policies for sub-second analytics at scale.
